It is increasingly clear that the constraint is going to be compute, just as the AI labs warned.

The token requirements for agentic work are high, making using frontier agents only cost efficient for high value tasks. There are tons of other opportunities waiting for lower costs

PyTorch at the micro-edge? Yes.

See how ExecuTorch brings PyTorch models to Arm microcontrollers—quantized, compiled, and running on a Corstone-320 + Ethos-U NPU (via FVP). 🔗 https://t.co/ZZh5LL8JSA

From training to deployment, end to end.

#PyTorch #ExecuTorch #EdgeAI #TinyML https://t.co/PTnO05xlvO
